# TX Gov Tracker

> Public-interest dashboard tracking money and polling in the 2026 Texas Gubernatorial Race. Campaign-finance filings sourced nightly from the Texas Ethics Commission's campaign-finance filings, plus aggregated public polling and independent-expenditure spending.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Race overview — top candidates, money, and polling at a glance.
- [Candidates](/candidates): Every declared candidate with finance totals, polling, and bio.
- [Polling](/polling): Polling averages and individual poll results for the 2026 race.
- [Top Donors](/top-donors): Largest individual and PAC contributors across all candidates.
- [Independent Expenditures](/independent-expenditures): Outside spending by committee, supporting or opposing candidates.
- [FAQ](/faq): How the data is sourced, updated, and what's included.
